title: Amrapali Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Amrapali Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Amrapali Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amrapali Group:
Amrapali Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amrapali Group!
